zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Beauchamp於1355年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波維其可時，他的父親Sir John de Beauchamp25歲，母親Joan de Cherlelton21歲。他於1392年6月29日之前與Lady Catherine Ufflete在英國武斯特斯爾波維其可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1375年登記服兵役。他於1399年被列為governor of pembrokeshire。他去世於1420年9月29日在英國英格蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Beauchamp于1355年1月1日出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波維其可时，他的父亲Sir John de Beauchamp25岁，母亲Joan de Cherlelton21岁。他于1392年6月29日之前与Lady Catherine Ufflete在英国武斯特斯爾波維其可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1375年登记服兵役。他于1399年被列为governor of pembrokeshire。他去世于1420年9月29日在英国英格兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Beauchamp was born on 1 January 1355, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Beauchamp, was 25 and his mother, Joan de Cherlelton, was 21. He married Lady Catherine Ufflete before 29 June 1392, in Powick, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1375. In 1399, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as governor of pembrokeshire. He died on 29 September 1420, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Beauchamp est né le 1 janvier 1355, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Beauchamp, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cherlelton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Ufflete avant 29 juin 1392, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1375. En 1399, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est governor of pembrokeshire. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1420, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Beauchamp am 1. Januar 1355 in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Beauchamp 25 und seine Mutter Joan de Cherlelton 21. Er hat vor 29. Juni 1392 in Powick, Worcestershire, England Lady Catherine Ufflete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1375 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1399, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als governor of pembrokeshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. September 1420 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Beauchamp è nato il il 1 gennaio 1355 nel Powick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Beauchamp, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Cherlelton, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Ufflete prima del 29 giugno 1392, nel Powick, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1375. Nel 1399, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come governor of pembrokeshire. Morì il 29 settembre 1420, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Beauchampが1355年1月1日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで生まれた時，父Sir John de Beauchampは25歳，母Joan de Cherleltonは21歳であった。1392年6月29日以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックでLady Catherine Uffleteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年に兵役登録をした。1399年，44歳の時，職業はgovernor of pembrokeshireと記録されている。彼は1420年9月29日にイギリスイギリスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Beauchamp(이)가 1355년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 파윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Beauchamp(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cherlelton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1392년 6월 29일 이전 영국 워스스터실르 파윅에서 Lady Catherine Ufflete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1399년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 governor of pembrokeshire이었다. 그는 1420년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 Jan 1355–29 September 1420: 1 de janeiro de 1355–29 de setembro de 1420
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Beauchamp nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1355, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Beauchamp, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Cherlelton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Ufflete antes 29 de junho de 1392, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1375. Em 1399, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como governor of pembrokeshire. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1420, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Beauchamp родился 1 января 1355 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Beauchamp было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cherlelton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Ufflete перед 29 июнь 1392 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1375 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1399 году, в возрасте 44 лет, работал по профессии governor of pembrokeshire. Он умер 29 сентября 1420 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.1 Jan 1355–29 September 1420: 1 de enero de 1355–29 de septiembre de 1420
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Beauchamp nació el 1 de enero de 1355, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Beauchamp, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan de Cherlelton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Ufflete antes de 29 de junio de 1392, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1375. En 1399, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era governor of pembrokeshire. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1420, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
